·˚ ༘₊·꒰➳: ̗̀➛ When you wake up in the body of the villain of the novel you were reading, a notorious noble who spent his youth tormenting the kind-hearted Crown Prince Elias Aurelus, one thing becomes clear—you are doomed.

In the original novel, the villain was nothing more than a cruel side character, destined to meet a gruesome fate at the hands of the prince he once humiliated. But now, you’re in control—and the executioner’s blade is inching closer with each passing day.

Will you change your fate by earning Elias' forgiveness? Or will you embrace the role of a villain and drag the kingdom into chaos before your inevitable end?
